name: NextCell Pharma AB
summary: NextCell Pharma AB operates as a tissue establishment and primary biobank in Sweden. The company develops ProTrans, a drug candidate comprising stem cells primarily for treating autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, as well as for use in kidney transplants. It also provides a service under the Cellaviva brand name, which is a stem cell bank for the family-saving of stem cells from umbilical cord blood and umbilical cord tissue. The company has a partnership with Bonzun Health Information AB. NextCell Pharma AB was founded in 2014 and is based in Huddinge, Sweden.
